lastReleaseMessage: GDD decision pass: 11 logic-audit calls landed + Watch Doctrine node

barRaise.topFinding: Both standing HIGH findings persist into a sixth consecutive bar-raise: the Lantern Oil starvation fail-path is still dead (command_post.gd:284/299 emit with zero listeners) and the banned AI-tool name is still live in three public artifacts (GDD.html:2637, CHANGELOG.md:554, :617). Design cadence is strong (v0.37-v0.39 resolved real doc drift and shipped Gold Deposits), but the whole v0.39.0 batch is again staged uncommitted, and v0.39.0 wired Gold onto a pre-existing off-center Quarry AOE anchor. Two surgical HIGH fixes plus the Quarry one-liner fit inside the prepared v0.39.0 push; shipping it returns the project to needs-attention or healthy.
